name: WLF_PAY_TRANSACTIONS
description: Table to store details of payment transactions.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: PAY_SYSTEM_ORDER_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates payment external reference id.

columns.Name: AUTHORIZATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates transaction authorization status code.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_PERFORMEDBY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates transaction performed by id.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates assignment record id for which payment is made.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates date on which transaction is made.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates payment external identifier type.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Indicates payment external identifier.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates transaction type of payment.

columns.Name: TRXN_EXTENSION_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates transaction type of extension id.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This column stores comments for the payment transaction

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: This column stores amount for the payment transaction

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores currency code for the payment transaction

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores reason code of refund transaction

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column stores status of transaction

columns.Name: PROCESSED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates user who processed the transaction

columns.Name: RELATED_PAY_TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: RELATED_PAY_TRANSACTION_ID
